info.name: Budget System API - Dual Mode (Manual + AI)
info.description: Complete collection for testing the dual-mode budget system

requests.name: 1. Get all budgets
requests.description: Retrieve all budgets for the authenticated user

requests.name: 2. Get single budget
requests.description: Get a specific budget with all its categories

requests.name: 3. Create MANUAL budget - Travel (Spanish)

body.title: Viaje a Machu Picchu
body.description: Vacaciones de verano 2025 a Perú con la familia

categories.name: Vuelos
categories.reason: Pasajes aéreos ida y vuelta para 2 personas

categories.name: Alojamiento
categories.reason: 3 noches en hotel 4 estrellas en Cusco

categories.name: Comida
categories.reason: Desayunos y cenas en restaurantes locales

categories.name: Actividades
categories.reason: Entrada a Machu Picchu y guía local

requests.description: Create a manual budget for a trip to Machu Picchu (Spanish language)

requests.name: 4. Create MANUAL budget - Event (English)

body.title: Wedding Reception
body.description: Reception for 100 guests, cocktail hour followed by dinner

categories.name: Venue
categories.reason: Room rental for 4 hours with tables and chairs

categories.name: Catering
categories.reason: Dinner for 100 guests with bar service

requests.description: Create a manual budget for a wedding reception (English language)

requests.name: 5. Generate AI suggestions - Party (Spanish)

body.title: Fiesta de cumpleaños de María
body.description: Cumpleaños número 30 de mi hermana. Queremos una fiesta con 50 personas en casa, con comida, decoración y entretenimiento. Debe ser memorable pero sin gastar demasiado.

requests.description: Generate AI suggestions for a birthday party. The system will detect Spanish language and 'party' plan type.

requests.name: 6. Generate AI suggestions - Project (English)

body.title: Home Kitchen Renovation
body.description: Complete renovation of the kitchen including new cabinets, countertops, appliances, and flooring. We want modern style with good quality materials.

requests.description: Generate AI suggestions for a home renovation project. The system will detect English language and 'project' plan type.

requests.name: 7. Save AI budget (after editing)
requests.description: Save an AI-generated budget after the user has reviewed and potentially edited the categories.

requests.name: 8. Update budget
requests.description: Update a budget. If total_amount changes, percentages are recalculated automatically.

requests.name: 9. Delete budget
requests.description: Delete a budget and all its categories

requests.name: 10. Validate budget
requests.description: Check if the sum of all categories equals the total_amount

requests.name: 11. Add category to budget
requests.description: Add a new category to an existing budget

requests.name: 12. Update category
requests.description: Update a category within a budget

requests.name: 13. Delete category
requests.description: Delete a specific category from a budget

requests.name: ERROR: Categories sum doesn't match

body.title: Budget Test
body.description: This will fail because sum doesn't equal total

requests.description: Example of validation error when categories sum ($700) doesn't match total_amount ($1000)

variables.description: Base URL of your Laravel API

notes.language_detection: System automatically detects Spanish vs English from title and description. Spanish keywords: viaje, fiesta, boda, proyecto, compra, evento, vacaciones, cumpleaños
notes.plan_type_detection: System automatically classifies plan type: travel, event, party, purchase, project, other
notes.budget_validation: Sum of categories MUST equal total_amount (tolerance: 0.01 for decimal rounding)
notes.percentage_calculation: Percentages are automatically calculated as (amount / total_amount) * 100
notes.rate_limiting: AI generation endpoint (/api/budgets/ai/generate) is rate-limited to 10 requests per minute
notes.authentication: All endpoints require Bearer token authentication (Sanctum)
notes.authorization: Users can only view/edit their own budgets. Cross-user access returns 403 Unauthorized
